_meta: DRAFTED alt text for review by Andrew O'Dell and Erica. Written from category/caption context since Weebly's alt was the placeholder 'Picture' on every image. Items marked with a trailing (verify) in _uncertain are best-guesses for map screenshots / representative card photos whose exact content should be confirmed.

alt.img-2585.jpg: ADA parking spaces at Belle Haven Park, with limited access-aisle width
alt.img-0481.jpg: An unmarked accessible trail at Belle Haven Park with no shade or seating
alt.img-0479.jpg: Picnic tables, grills, and trash cans on grass at Belle Haven Park, none wheelchair accessible
alt.img-0476.jpg: A park map sign at Belle Haven Park mounted at accessible height but not marking accessible areas

alt.img-0437.jpg: An informational park sign at accessible height at Huntley Meadows Park, without Braille
